title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation platform that addresses character consistency in AI-generated films through storyboard mode and unified character locking across scenes. It offers multi-shot generation with camera presets, an extend tool for longer sequences, and a built-in timeline editor for trimming and adding music without external software.
